---
title: "Charlotte Grenfell Bridgman Rogers"
---

## Charlotte Grenfell Bridgman Rogers

**Dates:** (d. 1888)

**Maiden name:** (Willyams)

### Description

cousin of Charlotte (Willyams) Pascoe

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. Humphrey Willyams and Mary Grenfell, she married (14 Oct 1823) Captain Frederick Rogers (1794-1874), first cousin to Mrs Pascoe, whose book she edited;  her collaborator was perhaps Mary Sophia Rogers (d.1900), her  husband's niece [LG 1906 Willyams, Rogers]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 22nd [1879?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
